pt.LAST_NAME_MAX_LENGTH: O sobrenome deve conter no máximo 30 caracteres.

pt.USER_EXISTS_PHONE: Já existe um usuário com esse telefone.

en.FIRST_NAME_MIN_LENGTH: First name must be at least 3 characters long.
en.FIRST_NAME_MAX_LENGTH: First name must be at most 30 characters long.
en.LAST_NAME_MIN_LENGTH: Last name must be at least 3 characters long.
en.LAST_NAME_MAX_LENGTH: Last name must be at most 30 characters long.
en.FIELD_PHONE_INVALID: The phone number provided is invalid.
en.PHONE_TOO_SHORT: The phone number is too short.
en.PHONE_TOO_LONG: The phone number is too long.
en.COUNTRY_INVALID: The provided country code is invalid.
en.USER_EXISTS_PHONE: A user with this phone number already exists.
en.COUNTRY_NOT_FOUND: The specified country was not found.
en.CONTACT_ALREADY_EXISTS: A contact with this phone number already exists.
